markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting between Anything and GrowthX to align on content strategy and marketing goals.](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Anything is focused on entrepreneurs building AI-powered apps to make money online, with a current growth rate of \~$3-4M in revenue](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Key differentiators: agent reliability, mobile app support, built-in infrastructure, and high-quality AI-generated designs](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Main growth channels: product launches, social UGC, and now expanding into AI/SEO content with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
  - [Retention challenges: expense, reliability issues, and users forgetting to use the product regularly](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)

## Topics

### Anything's Product and Market Position

  - [Recently pivoted to an AI app builder, launched in August 2023](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Revenue grew to \~$2M in first 2 weeks, now at $3-4M run rate](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Differentiators:](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
      - [Reliable AI agent (compared favorably to dev-focused tools)](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
      - [Strong mobile app building capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [High-quality AI-generated designs](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
      - [End-to-end infrastructure built-in (no need for external services)](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Targeting entrepreneurs wanting to make money online with AI apps](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Pricing tiers from $50 to $2000/month](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)

### User Demographics and Behavior

  - [\~40% identify as entrepreneurs or want to launch new products/services](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - ["Tech-adjacent builders" - not full-time devs but familiar with app development](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
  - [Job roles include marketers, designers, product managers, IT/ops](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [User journey often starts with internal tools, evolves to monetization](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [Most sticky users: those building real products/services with revenue potential](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [Conversion often happens within first 3 hours of usage](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2318.0)

### Current Marketing and Growth Channels

  - [\~5K daily sign-ups across channels](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2832.0)
  - [Channel breakdown:](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
      - [Search: 20%](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
      - [Word of mouth: 30%](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
      - [AI-related: 12%](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
      - [Social (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter): remainder](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
  - [Focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
    1.  Product launches
    2.  Social UGC (TikTok, LinkedIn, X, YouTube, Reddit)
    3.  AI/SEO content (new focus with GrowthX)
  - [Potential future channels: partnerships, agency partner programs](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2992.0)

### Retention Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Main churn reasons:](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)
    1.  Expense (especially for less serious users)
    2.  Reliability issues (top product focus to improve)
    3.  Users forgetting to use the product regularly
  - [Opportunity: Create content as triggers to re-engage users](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2721.0)
  - [Plan to add more background processes and potentially charge for hosting](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=2775.0)

### Content Strategy and Quality Bar

  - [CEO recently rewrote blog content to improve quality](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Aiming for a tone similar to OpenAI, Stripe, and Paul Graham's writing](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Want content that appeals to both customers and potential hires/investors](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Goal: Be known as the go-to platform for making money online with AI apps](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Metrics and Goals

  - [Primary metric: ARR growth](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3427.0)
  - [Secondary goals:](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3427.0)
      - [Driving high-converting traffic](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3427.0)
      - [Improving retention through helpful content](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3427.0)
      - [Building brand awareness to attract users and potential hires](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3427.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send "what we heard" recap of the kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3549.0)
  - [Anything to provide access to Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and CMS](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3222.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop and share for review:](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3549.0)
      - [Audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3549.0)
      - [Company context document](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3549.0)
      - [Writing guidelines (aiming for OpenAI/Stripe/Paul Graham style)](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3549.0)
  - [Schedule weekly sync-up meetings](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3549.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin developing larger content strategy based on topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/iPh4UsxES1f1Hvc7L7ftBroBZyaT5Xsn?tab=summary&timestamp=3549.0)
